prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19782名、2026年扩招16.7%（位次后移约1978名）、物理类考生略有减少（竞争略缓解）、学校排名持续上升及声誉偏负面等因素，考虑考生规模减少和排名上升的正面作用，预测最低位次约21560名，区间21060-22060名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9399 → 19333 → 17876 → 16497 → 19782, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1900 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 19782; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 65 in 2021, 66 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 72 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 84, an increase of 12 students (+16.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant increase in enrollment and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (2021: 65 → 2022: 66 → 2023: 67 → 2024: 71 → 2025: 62 → 2026: 57), showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 73rd, rated 'average'); the 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative (professor assessment incident). Overall reputation is somewhat negative, slightly suppressing application enthusiasm; Law is rated A, Applied Economics is A-, both are the school's flagship disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 shows differentiated and wait-and-see popularity; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics show differentiated and wait-and-see popularity (65.49), with overall finance and economics majors trending toward differentiation; the total number of provincial candidates in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated physics category of about 314,000 based on recent proportions, slightly decreasing from 321,000 in 2025; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024; the school is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, offering some regional appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 19782, a 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking backward shift of about 1978), a slight decrease in physics category candidates (slightly eased competition), the school's continuously rising ranking, and somewhat negative reputation, considering the positive effects of reduced candidate numbers and rising ranking, the predicted minimum ranking is about 21560, with a range of 21060-22060.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1379 → 1620 → 2089 → 1332, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, it notably dropped, then in 2025, it moved up substantially. The 2025 baseline is about 1332. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 47 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 45 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of 2 students (-4.44%) compared to 2025. The slight reduction in enrollment plan eases competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity is average (73rd overall). The 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative. Overall, the reputation is somewhat negative, slightly suppressing application enthusiasm. Law is rated A, Applied Economics A-, both highly regarded advantageous disciplines for liberal arts candidates, strongly attracting applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Law saw polarized popularity with a wait-and-see attitude; Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics also showed polarized wait-and-see. In 2026, the province's total examinees are about 451,000, with an estimated 137,000 in the history category based on recent proportions, slightly down from 141,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 477 points, up from 462 in 2024, reflecting potentially intensified overall competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has some regional appeal for Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1332, a 4.44% enrollment reduction in 2026 (ranking shift forward by about 36 places), a slight decrease in history category examinees (slightly eased competition), and a rise in the provincial control line (intensified competition), and factoring in the intensified competition reflected by the rising control line, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1316, with a range of 816-1816.
